Container.Name: Odysseus-ntfy
Container.Overview: Notification service for Odysseus reminders and alerts (optional companion).
Container.Description: ntfy is a simple HTTP-based pub-sub notification service used by Odysseus for sending push notifications, reminders, and scheduled task alerts. This is an optional companion — Odysseus will work without it, but scheduled task notifications will not be delivered. This companion template ensures the container is named odysseus-ntfy so everything is consistent with the main Odysseus configuration.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: ntfy base URL for notification links
